title: [Blog] Intro Section
description: Introductory text section for the blog.

heading.default: Stories, tips, and insights for pet lovers.

desc1.default: Explore helpful guides, dog care tips, training insights, and lifestyle stories designed to help you and your furry companion enjoy life together.

desc2.default: From playtime ideas and training advice to pet-friendly experiences, the Pawland Journal shares moments, knowledge, and inspiration for every pet owner.
